creator: Mark Manson
why: Strong personal-development ideas without pure hustle energy; useful for existential hooks and anti-default-life framing.

creator: HealthyGamerGG
why: Great source for audience pain language around attention, avoidance, identity, loneliness, gaming/scrolling, and feeling behind.

creator: The School of Life
why: Philosophical and emotionally literate ideas that can be translated into Don's warmer, less polished voice.

creator: Ryan Holiday
why: Good for simple discipline/agency mechanics, with a need to soften the stoic-guru energy for Don.

creator: Ali Abdaal
why: Useful mainstream productivity reference point; system should extract mechanics while filtering content-bro optimisation vibes.

creator: Chris Williamson / Modern Wisdom
why: Good signal source for under-30 existential, dating, discipline, and modern-life discomfort topics.

creator: Better Ideas
why: Casual tone and self-aware productivity adjacent ideas; good for mechanics that don't feel too corporate.

creator: Cal Newport
why: Direct fit for attention, focus, phone addiction, and reclaiming life from digital noise.

creator: Pursuit of Wonder
why: Strong philosophical packaging; useful for visual/idea patterns that can be made more personal by Don.

creator: Einzelgänger
why: Good source for philosophy and anti-mainstream ideas, especially solitude and inner freedom.

creator: Sisyphus 55
why: Useful for darker existential hooks and absurdism/meaning mechanics.

creator: Big Think
why: Broad public-intellectual signal source; good for seeing which big ideas survive short-form packaging.
